kpi.label: 覆蓋人口潛力
kpi.sub: 全球手機用戶可服務市場

scqa.situation: AST SpaceMobile is building the world's first and only space-based cellular broadband network designed to connect standard smartphones directly to satellites — no special hardware required. The company operates using AT&T, Verizon, Rakuten, and 45+ other mobile network operators as distribution partners. Q1 2026 revenue was $14.7M (vs $13.8M in all of FY2024), reflecting early commercial service launch with 5 Block 1 BlueBird satellites and ramp of Block 2 20-satellite constellation. GAAP net loss was $191M in Q1 2026, with $3.5B cash on hand following the $900M equity raise in Q4 2025.
scqa.complication: AST is fundamentally a pre-revenue company in transition: $14.7M quarterly revenue is nascent compared to a projected TAM of $1 trillion in annual mobile revenue. The company needs $3B+ in additional capital to fully deploy the planned 243-satellite constellation (Block 3+). Satellite manufacturing speed is the critical bottleneck: Block 2 (100 satellites) manufacturing target is Q4 2026, with full constellation completing 2028-2029. SpaceX Starlink is exploring direct-to-device capability. Iridium and legacy LEO operators remain competitive alternatives.
scqa.question: Can AST SpaceMobile achieve sufficient satellite density and MNO revenue sharing agreements to justify a US$9.5B market cap before cash runs out, and before Starlink captures the direct-to-device market?
scqa.answer: High-risk, high-reward. The technology works (successful 4G LTE calls demonstrated over standard iPhones with AT&T, Verizon, and Rakuten in 2025). The $3.5B cash runway covers 2-3 years of current operations plus Block 2 manufacturing. The 5-year probability-weighted PT is US$48 (bull case) or US$4 (bear case). For near-term 12-month: base case PT US$25, assuming Block 2 on-orbit completion Q4 2026 and first commercial revenue ramp to $60M/quarter by Q4 2026.

key_points: Q1 2026 revenue $14.7M — first meaningful commercial revenue from MNO partners using 5 Block 1 BlueBird satellites in commercial service since Sept 2025
Block 2 (20 satellites already on orbit as of Q1 2026); Block 2 completion target: 100 satellites by Q4 2026 (additional 80 manufacturing/launch in progress)
Cash $3.5B: sufficient for Block 2 full deployment + Block 3 initiation; no near-term liquidity risk
45+ MNO partnership agreements: AT&T (US), Verizon (US), Rakuten Mobile (Japan), Globe Telecom (Philippines), Indosat (Indonesia), and 40+ others
Q2 2026 guidance: revenue $30-40M as Block 2 satellites activate; management targeting $500M+ annual revenue run-rate by end of 2026

company_data.description: AST SpaceMobile is a technology company developing a space-based cellular broadband network. Unlike other satellite internet providers (Starlink, OneWeb) that require specialized terminals, AST's BlueBird satellites are designed to provide 4G/5G connectivity to standard off-the-shelf smartphones using existing cellular frequencies (Band 14, Band 75, n255). The company partners with mobile network operators who resell satellite coverage under their own brands, giving AST a massive existing distribution network without direct consumer marketing costs.

segments.name: Satellite Services
segments.description: Direct-to-device broadband revenue from MNO partnerships. Q1 2026: early commercial service, 5 Block 1 satellites + 20 Block 2 satellites on orbit

segments.name: Engineering Services
segments.description: Engineering services contracts with MNO partners for network integration and testing; legacy revenue from BlueWalker 3 technology validation phase

key_metrics.full_year_2026_target: US$500M+ annual run-rate by end of 2026

balance_sheet.source: AST SpaceMobile Form 10-Q filed 2026-05-11, Balance Sheet as of March 31, 2026

financials.source: AST SpaceMobile Form 10-Q filed 2026-05-11 (SEC EDGAR CIK 0001780312, period ended 2026-03-31) and 8-K earnings release filed 2026-05-11

management_quotes.speaker: Abel Avellan, Chairman & CEO
management_quotes.quote: We are in the early commercial stages of the most disruptive technology in the history of telecommunications. With $3.5 billion in cash and 45-plus MNO partners representing over 2 billion subscribers, we have both the capital and the distribution to reach a scale that no other direct-to-device company can match. Block 2 is deploying on schedule.
management_quotes.source: AST SpaceMobile Form 8-K (Q1 2026 earnings release), filed 2026-05-11, SEC EDGAR CIK 0001780312

management_quotes.speaker: Scott Wisniewski, CFO
management_quotes.quote: We ended Q1 with $3.5 billion in cash and investments. Q1 revenue of $14.7 million reflects the early commercial phase with 5 Block 1 satellites. As Block 2 satellites activate through the year, we expect meaningful acceleration with Q2 guidance of $30-40 million. Our capital structure is the strongest it has ever been.
management_quotes.source: AST SpaceMobile Form 8-K (Q1 2026 earnings release), filed 2026-05-11, SEC EDGAR CIK 0001780312

product_deep_dive.why_key: The BlueBird Block 2 satellite is the revenue-generating product — each satellite provides approximately 30Mbps aggregate throughput to standard smartphones in its 5,000km² footprint. Block 2 is 10x larger than Block 1 (400m² aperture vs 40m²), enabling 10x more throughput per satellite and the first economically scalable direct-to-device service. The Block 2 constellation (100 satellites) is designed to cover all major population centers at 35°+ latitude.

specs.detail: Standard 4G LTE / 5G smartphones; no hardware modification

product_deep_dive.market_size: Total addressable market: 5.6 billion smartphone users globally without reliable broadband. MNO direct-to-device addressable revenue estimated $50-200B annually if 5-10% of users pay $5-15/month premium. ASTS targets initial 1% penetration = $2B+ annual revenue potential.
product_deep_dive.revenue_contribution: Q1 2026: $14.7M (early commercial); Q2 2026 guidance $30-40M; management targets $500M+ annual run-rate by Q4 2026 as Block 2 full constellation activates

positive.label: First-mover: only working D2D broadband constellation

negative.label: Pre-scale: $14.7M Q1 revenue vs $9.5B market cap
SpaceX Starlink D2D threat (exploring broadband D2D)

technical.volume_trend: 大幅波動，機構持股比例高（ARK, T. Rowe Price）
technical.key_support: US$15.00 (強支撐，200 日均線附近)
technical.note: 高波動投機性標的；催化劑（Block 2 全部上線）前方向不明

cashflow.title: 現金流分析（早期商業化階段）
cashflow.lead: Q1 2026 現金消耗估 $200M（含衛星製造 Capex）。$3.5B 現金餘額提供 ~17 季跑道。無近期流動性危機。

cfi.label: Capex Q1 2026
cfi.note: Block 2 衛星製造及地面站基礎設施

cashflow.fcf_note: Block 2 全部製造完成後（Q4 2026），年度 Capex 預計降至 $150M，FCF 消耗速率顯著改善。

runway.note: 長期負債，無近期到期壓力

cashflow.runway_conclusion: 以 $200M/季消耗率計，$3.5B 現金可支撐至 2030 年，足夠完成 Block 2（100 衛星）及啟動 Block 3。但若收入不達預期且消耗率上升，可能需要再融資。

solvency.note: 充裕，覆蓋完整 Block 2 計畫

bear.label: 保守
bear.assumption: Block 2 delayed; Starlink launches D2D broadband H1 2027 stealing MNO deal pipeline; revenue $150M by 2027; market cap collapses to $1.5B (EV/Revenue 10x) → PT $4

base.label: 基本
base.assumption: Block 2 complete Q4 2026; Q4 2026 revenue run-rate $80-100M/quarter; 2027 revenue $450M; EV/Revenue 20x → market cap $9B → PT $18-25

bull.label: 樂觀
bull.assumption: Block 2 + Block 3 on track; 2028 revenue $3B (1% TAM penetration); EV/Revenue 15x → market cap $45B → PT $75+; MNO revenue sharing at 20% of $15B addressable

risks.title: SpaceX Starlink D2D 競爭威脅
risks.detail: SpaceX 已測試 Starlink direct-to-cell (T-Mobile 合作)，若推廣 4G/5G 標準手機 D2D，ASTS 最大差異化優勢受威脅。SpaceX 資金和執行速度均強於 ASTS，嚴重性：極高

risks.title: 估值嚴重脫離現實收入
risks.detail: 市值 $9.5B vs Q1 2026 收入 $14.7M，EV/Revenue（NTM）隱含 $500M+ 2026 年收入高預期。若商業化進度落後，多重壓縮幅度可能超過 50%，嚴重性：高

risks.title: 衛星製造速度瓶頸
risks.detail: Block 2 需要製造 100 顆大型衛星（400m² 天線），製造複雜度高。任何延遲都會推遲商業化時程，嚴重性：中

risks.title: 監管/頻譜風險
risks.detail: FCC Band 14 及新 n255 頻譜使用條件若被挑戰（MNO 競爭者可提出異議），商業化計畫受阻，嚴重性：中

risks.title: 再融資稀釋風險
risks.detail: 雖現有 $3.5B 充足，但若 Block 3（2028 年後）需要追加 $3B+，股權稀釋不可避免，嚴重性：低

catalysts.title: Block 2 第一批商業服務啟動（Q2/Q3 2026）
catalysts.detail: 每增加 10 顆 Block 2 衛星激活，收入顯著跳升，直接驗證商業化能力

catalysts.title: AT&T / Verizon 商業收費啟動（2026）
catalysts.detail: 主要美國 MNO 在美國境內向消費者收取 D2D 費用，驗證消費者付費意願

catalysts.title: Q2 2026 收入確認（$30-40M 指引）
catalysts.detail: 若達成或超越指引，確認加速趨勢，短期正面催化劑

catalysts.title: Block 3 衛星合約及政府合約（2026/2027）
catalysts.detail: DARPA/SBIR/SDA 政府合約可提供非稀釋性收入，驗證技術可信度

supply_chain.position: Vertically Integrated Satellite Manufacturer + Service Provider
supply_chain.description: AST SpaceMobile designs and manufactures its BlueBird satellites in-house at its Midland, TX facility. Key differentiation: proprietary phased array antenna technology (400m² per Block 2 satellite). Launch partnerships: SpaceX Falcon 9 (primary), with backup options via Rocket Lab and ISRO. Ground segment: owned and operated globally. Chip technology: custom ASICs for signal processing (partnerships with Intel, Samsung for next-gen).

industry.name: Non-Terrestrial Network (NTN) / Direct-to-Device Satellite Broadband
drivers: 5.6B smartphone users with spotty/no coverage — addressable by D2D satellite
3GPP Release 17/18 standards formalizing NTN D2D integration
MNO willingness to pay for coverage expansion without building towers
industry.competitive_dynamics: ASTS is the first to achieve working broadband D2D with standard phones. SpaceX T-Mobile NTN partnership (narrowband initially) is the main competitor. 3GPP standardization creates regulatory moat but also enables future competitors. First-to-scale wins disproportionate MNO relationships.

bull_reasons: 唯一已完成真實 4G LTE 直連標準手機的在軌衛星系統，技術先行優勢顯著
45+ MNO 合作夥伴覆蓋 20 億+ 用戶，零消費者行銷成本的分銷網絡
現金 $3.5B 覆蓋完整 Block 2 + Block 3 計畫，無近期融資壓力
若 2028 年達到 1% TAM 滲透（~$2B 年收入），當前市值被嚴重低估
bear_reasons: 市值 $9.5B vs 年化收入 $59M（Q1 ×4），估值完全依賴未來期望
SpaceX T-Mobile NTN 若升級至 4G/5G 標準，ASTS 差異化消失
衛星製造規模化比預期困難，延誤可能嚴重傷害投資人信心
Q1 2026 毛利率負 63%，商業模式尚未驗證可盈利
key_monitor: Block 2 月度衛星激活進度（目標 Q4 2026 全 100 顆在軌）
季度 MNO 收入確認（目標 Q4 2026 達到 $100M+/季）
AT&T/Verizon 美國消費者 D2D 定價宣布
SpaceX T-Mobile NTN 技術升級公告（競爭風險監控）
Block 3 衛星合約和政府 SBIR/SDA 標案確認

disclaimer: 本報告由 Investment Research Desk 提供，僅供資訊參考，不構成投資建議或要約。所有預估數據均為分析判斷，不保證準確性。ASTS 為高風險早期商業化公司，投資前請充分評估風險。本報告不得作為任何投資決策之唯一依據。過去表現不代表未來結果。

qa.question: AT&T/Verizon 商業定價何時宣布？
qa.response: H2 2026 預計正式費率公告，Block 2 激活後

qa.question: Block 2 製造進度？
qa.response: 20 顆在軌，100 顆目標 Q4 2026，進度如期

qa.question: SpaceX T-Mobile NTN 競爭？
qa.response: 目前 SpaceX 僅達窄頻，ASTS 為寬頻 4G LTE

earnings.market_reaction: 法說後股價+12%（次日），$3.5B 現金和 Q2 加速指引為正面催化劑
